# Prompt Element Cards

## Do Not Edit Files Yet

Purpose:

```text
Prevents immediate implementation.
```

## Inspect Repo Context

Purpose:

```text
Forces Claude to read repo rules and relevant files.
```

## Identify Likely Root Cause

Purpose:

```text
Avoids guessing the fix.
```

## List Behavior to Preserve

Purpose:

```text
Protects API, tests, payment, security, and architecture behavior.
```

## Propose Small Implementation Plan

Purpose:

```text
Keeps changes reviewable.
```

## Identify Tests Needed

Purpose:

```text
Connects change to verification.
```

## Identify Risks

Purpose:

```text
Surfaces architecture, security, API, and approval risks.
```

## Wait for Approval

Purpose:

```text
Creates a human checkpoint before coding.
```
